name: Pets Roll: Clicker
description: Pets Roll is a colorful idle gacha game where you roll eggs, hatch adorable cube-style pets, and build the ultimate collection. With 187 unique pets across 11 rarity grades — from Common kittens to Legendary golden dragons — every roll is a surprise! How to play? Click or tap the Roll button to hatch a pet. Use the shop to buy pets and eggs, manage your nests, complete daily quests, and collect buff multipliers to boost your luck. Features - 187 unique pets with cube-style art - 11 rarity grades from Common to Legendary - 26 themed collections - 17 egg tiers with incubation nests - Rebirth prestige system - Daily quests, bonuses & shop
instructions: - Desktop Click to roll navigate menus and manage your collection - Mobile Tap to roll swipe to browse collections and shop
